name: Odisha
landmark: Konark Sun Temple and Jagannath Temple, Puri
stopoverNote: Bhubaneswar (BBI) is the practical gateway. Puri is the best base for Konark and Chilika; if this route is followed as separate stops, treat Konark→Chilika as a longer reposition via Puri rather than a sightseeing-heavy day.

diet.vegetarian: Odisha is easy for vegetarians: dalma, pakhala, saag bhaja, temple-style thalis and Jagannath Mahaprasad are vegetarian. Puri also has many pure-veg restaurants, though coastal menus lean heavily toward seafood.
diet.vegan: Ask for preparations without ghee, milk, curd or chhena. Rice, pakhala, dalma without ghee tadka, besara and simple vegetable curries can be vegan, but rasgulla, chhena poda, chhena gaja and many sweets are dairy-based.
phrases: Aama khadya niramisha = our food is vegetarian
Daya kari ghia/dudha/dahi/chhena debenu nahi = please do not add ghee, milk, curd or chhena
Machha nahi, mangsa nahi = no fish, no meat

cities.name: Bhubaneswar
cities.notes: The Temple City of India — ancient Kalinga temples, Jain rock-cut caves and the easiest airport gateway for the Odisha Golden Triangle.

cities.name: Puri
cities.notes: One of India's four sacred dhams — Jagannath Temple, Grand Road rituals, beach sunsets and craft villages nearby.

cities.name: Konark
cities.notes: The 13th-century Sun Temple — a UNESCO-listed stone chariot of 24 wheels, seven horses and masterful Kalinga sculpture.

cities.name: Chilika Lake
cities.notes: Asia's largest brackish-water lagoon — Satapada boat rides, Irrawaddy dolphins and winter migratory birds around Nalabana.

itinerary.sim: Any Indian prepaid SIM (Jio or Airtel) works well in Bhubaneswar, Puri and Konark; coverage can become patchier around Chilika boat routes.

Bhubaneswar.name: Bhubaneswar
Bhubaneswar.note: Two days is ideal: one for the old-town temple circuit and Jain caves, one for Dhauli, museums and a gentler transfer toward the coast.

days.note: The temple cluster and caves fit in one day with a cab or auto loop. Non-Hindus cannot enter Lingaraj Temple; use the Curzon viewing platform outside the compound.

activities.name: Lingaraj Temple exterior and Curzon Platform viewpoint
activities.tip: Hindu visitors can join the temple queue; non-Hindu visitors should view from the designated platform outside.

activities.name: Mukteswar Temple and nearby Kalinga shrines
Udayagiri and Khandagiri Jain caves
activities.tip: Wear shoes with grip for the cave steps and viewpoints.

activities.name: Rajarani Temple sculpture stop
Odisha State Museum or tribal craft galleries

hotels.name: Bhubaneswar budget guesthouse near railway station
Mid-range hotel near Jaydev Vihar or Old Town

meals: Pakhala and saag bhaja at a local restaurant
Chhena poda from a sweet shop

days.note: Use this as a buffer day if arriving late or before driving to Puri. Dhauli is an easy detour on the Bhubaneswar–Puri road.

activities.name: Dhauli Peace Pagoda and Ashokan edicts
Ekamra Haat or local craft market
Nandankanan or museum buffer if travelling with family

hotels.name: Bhubaneswar budget guesthouse near railway station
Mid-range hotel near Jaydev Vihar or Old Town

meals: Chhena sweets if not avoiding dairy

days.note: Only add this day for a softer pace, extra museums or family-friendly wildlife time before the coast.

activities.name: Regional Museum of Natural History
Kalinga Stadium district café break
Old Town evening temple walk from outside the shrines

hotels.name: Mid-range hotel near Jaydev Vihar or Old Town

Puri.name: Puri
Puri.note: Puri is the emotional centre and the most practical base for the route: temple rituals, beach time, Raghurajpur crafts and easy day trips.

days.theme: Jagannath, Grand Road and Puri Beach
days.note: Jagannath Temple and the beach are close enough for one day. Non-Hindus are not permitted inside the Jagannath Temple main sanctum or complex; view the temple from the Raghunandan Library rooftop instead.

activities.name: Jagannath Temple exterior, Grand Road and Raghunandan Library rooftop viewpoint
activities.tip: Hindu visitors can enter via the proper queue; non-Hindu visitors should use the rooftop view outside.

activities.name: Ananda Bazaar Mahaprasad experience
activities.tip: Mahaprasad is vegetarian; vegans should avoid ghee and chhena-based items.

activities.name: Puri Beach sunrise or Swargadwar sunset walk
Gundicha Temple and Rath Yatra route context
Sea Beach Road craft shops and sand art stroll

meals: Seafood restaurants along the beach for non-vegetarians

days.theme: Raghurajpur craft village and relaxed beach time
days.note: Raghurajpur is close to Puri, so keep the day light and buy directly from artist households where possible.

activities.name: Raghurajpur Heritage Craft Village — pattachitra and palm-leaf etching
activities.tip: Arrive in the morning and purchase directly from families rather than commission shops.

activities.name: Pipili appliqué craft stop if transferring onward
Blue Flag beach facilities or quieter north beach
Evening temple-town food walk

days.theme: Festival buffer or slow coast day
days.note: Use this day during Rath Yatra, beach-heavy trips or if weather delays a Konark or Chilika excursion.

activities.name: Rath Yatra route and chariot-building context around Grand Road
Long beach morning and sand-art viewing
Local market for khaja and temple souvenirs

Konark.name: Konark
Konark.note: A focused one-day UNESCO stop from Puri; stay overnight only for the dance festival, light-and-sound show or a very relaxed photography pace.

days.theme: Sun Temple, museum and Chandrabhaga coast
days.note: Leave Puri early. The Sun Temple needs unhurried time for the wheels, horses and sculptural panels; the beach is a short hop afterward.

activities.name: Konark Sun Temple — UNESCO stone chariot complex
activities.cost: ₹40 online / ₹50 counter (Indian); ₹600 foreign; children under 15 free
activities.tip: Arrive early for lower heat and better light; hire a licensed guide if you want iconographic context.

activities.name: Konark ASI Museum
Chandrabhaga Beach
Konark Light and Sound Show
activities.tip: Timings shift seasonally; verify the same day before staying back.

hotels.name: Simple Konark guesthouse during festival nights

meals: Simple Odia thali near Konark market

days.note: Only add this day for Konark Dance Festival, dawn photography or a no-rush beach-and-temple revisit.

activities.name: Sunrise photography around Chandrabhaga Beach
Second slow walk around Sun Temple sculpture panels
activities.cost: ₹40 online / ₹50 counter (Indian); ₹600 foreign; children under 15 free

activities.name: Konark Dance Festival evening if dates align

hotels.name: Simple Konark guesthouse during festival nights

meals: Tea and snacks near temple market

Chilika Lake.name: Chilika Lake
Chilika Lake.note: A one-day lagoon and wildlife stop is enough for most travellers; winter mornings are best for birds and calmer dolphin-spotting boat rides.

days.theme: Satapada lagoon cruise, dolphins and birdlife
days.note: Start early from Puri or Konark and keep the boat ride to daylight hours. Monsoon can suspend or disrupt boat services, so avoid July to September.

activities.name: Chilika Lake Satapada boat ride for Irrawaddy dolphins
activities.cost: ₹800–₹1,500/boat for ~1.5h dolphin route; ₹2,500–₹3,500/boat for longer ~3h route

activities.name: Nalabana birdlife viewpoint or winter migratory-bird route
activities.tip: Birding is strongest November to January.

activities.name: Sea-mouth or lagoon-island stop, subject to boat route
Kalijai island temple if taking the longer route

days.note: Add only for birders, photographers or travellers who want a second attempt at dolphins in calm morning light.

activities.name: Early repeat boat ride or birding route
activities.cost: ₹800–₹1,500/boat for ~1.5h dolphin route; ₹2,500–₹3,500/boat for longer ~3h route

activities.name: Village-side lagoon walk and fish landing observation
Return drive to Puri or Bhubaneswar

connections.method: Taxi/cab via NH-316, bus or train
Taxi/auto or bus via Marine Drive

extras: Odisha's coastal belt has cyclone risk in October and November; check IMD advisories before coastal transfers or boat rides.
Puri is the practical base for both Konark and Chilika even when they are modelled as route stops; avoid changing hotels unless you want a slower pace.
Non-Hindus cannot enter Jagannath Temple in Puri or Lingaraj Temple in Bhubaneswar; use the designated outside viewpoints and treat the restriction respectfully.
Chilika boat rides are best in calm winter mornings and can be disrupted in monsoon months; confirm locally before travelling to Satapada.
Quoted exact activity fees are limited to the verified Konark ASI ticket and Chilika boat ranges from the research; other activity costs are marked as varies.
